name: Indiamart Lead Notifier
description: Monitor Indiamart buy-leads and receive alerts on your phone.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: script-src 'self'; object-src 'self'; connect-src https://*.firebaseio.com wss://*.firebaseio.com https://*.firebasedatabase.app wss://*.firebasedatabase.app https://*.googleapis.com https://identitytoolkit.googleapis.com https://securetoken.googleapis.com https://exp.host https://accounts.google.com https://oauth2.googleapis.com;
